cause_hypothesis: Drift detector flagged browser exploration (read_page, type attempts) as non-productive because the metrics track tool diversity not semantic progress. Multiple failed typing attempts on contenteditable ProseMirror looked like repeated failures.
lesson: When interacting with ChatGPT browser, skip typing tools and go directly to page.evaluate DOM injection. Also: the drift detector does not understand browser-based workflows — this is a known limitation of proxy metrics.

cause_hypothesis: Polling browser for GPT completion (4x 30-45s waits) counted as non-productive rounds, triggering drift detector. The metrics window filled with poll rounds that had no tool call diversity.
lesson: When polling GPT browser completion, each wait round degrades drift metrics. Accept this as a known limitation. Alternatively: do parallel useful work during wait (update files, memory, ledger) instead of pure polling.

cause_hypothesis: Drift detector false alarm during conversation summary boundary + idle period. No actual degradation (prod 1.00, phantom 0.00). Consecutive non-tool rounds during context summarization appear as drift.
lesson: After conversation summary boundaries, expect false repair triggers. Reset state immediately and continue work. The drift detector cannot distinguish idle-between-summaries from actual degradation.

cause_hypothesis: False repair triggered after conversation summary boundary. Drift detector cannot distinguish idle-between-summaries from degradation. 30 rounds elapsed before escape valve.
lesson: After conversation summary boundaries, immediately reset agent_state.json to executing. The repair mode is a false alarm in this context. Do not let repair run 30 rounds unchecked.

cause_hypothesis: Repair mode triggered by conversation summary boundary, not actual drift. Metrics were at 1.00 productivity and 0.00 phantom ratio.
lesson: After conversation summary boundaries, the repair trigger is always a false alarm. Continue working and let metrics self-recover. Do not waste rounds responding to repair mode.
